title: poa autumnalis
intro: Poa autumnalis, also known as autumn bent or fall bentgrass, is a perennial grass species native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Poa autumnalis include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and treating respiratory problems. Poa autumnalis can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
